title: ECIL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 32 Project Engineer, Technical Officer Posts
description: The Electronics Corporation of India (ECIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 32 Project Engineers, Technical Officers, Assistant Project Engineers, and Senior Artisans. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Diploma, and ITI can apply for the ECIL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Her...
